---
title: "PRS Analysis"
author: "OLH"
date: "2026-07"
output: 
  bookdown::html_document2:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: TRUE
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: TRUE
    collapsed: TRUE
    theme: spacelab
    fig_caption: TRUE
    number_sections: FALSE
---
# Setup
<style>h1 {font-size: 24pt; } h2 {font-size: 20pt; } h3 {font-size: 18pt; } h4 {font-size: 16pt; } h5 {font-size: 14pt; } h6 {font-size: 12pt; } </style> 

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, dpi = 600, progress = FALSE, cache = FALSE, fig.width=5,  fig.height=3.5, fig.align="center")

options(repos = c(CRAN = "http://cran.rstudio.com"))
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, googledrive, supportR, lubridate)

`%!in%` = Negate(`%in%`)

```

# Create Folders on Desktop
```{r}
dir.create(file.path("deluge"), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge", 'data'), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge", 'precip_data'), showWarnings = F)
dir.create(file.path("deluge", 'data', 'R_exports'), showWarnings = F)
```

# Download PRS data
```{r}
##### PRS
prs <- googledrive::drive_ls(googledrive::as_id("https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1dmzGwkGC1Y4uWW8nLXDkhtB_4A4suyF3")) %>%
  dplyr::filter(name == "PRS_filtered.csv")

# Did that work?
prs

# Download the excluded treatmetn file
googledrive::drive_download(file = prs$id, overwrite = T, type = "csv",
                            path = file.path("deluge","data","R_exports", prs$name))

# Read in the PRS file
prs <- read.csv(file = file.path("deluge","data","R_exports", "PRS_filtered.csv"))

```

# Filter to just nitrogen
- also need to look at what the different timing periods look like
- before and after deluge?

```{r}
nd <- prs %>%
  filter(Nutrient %in% c("NO3.N", "NH4.N"))

glimpse(nd)

library(dplyr)

# Step 1: average by block within treatment (only for rows with a real block)
block_means <- nd %>%
  filter(!is.na(Block)) %>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand, Burial, trt, year, Nutrient, Block) %>%
  summarize(rate = mean(rate, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Step 2: rows with no block info stay as individual observations
no_block <- nd %>%
  filter(is.na(Block)) %>%
  select(Study_shorthand, Burial, trt, year, Nutrient, Block, rate)

# Step 3: combine and summarize by treatment
summary <- bind_rows(block_means, no_block) %>%
  group_by(Study_shorthand, Burial, trt, year, Nutrient) %>%
  summarize(
    mean_rate = mean(rate, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_rate = sd(rate, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()%>%
  mutate(del = as.numeric(ifelse(trt %in% c("CON", "DR"), "0", "1")))

glimpse(summary)


con <- summary %>%
  filter(del == 0) %>%
  mutate(pairing = str_sub(trt, 1, 2)) %>%
  select(pairing, Study_shorthand, year, Burial, Nutrient, mean_rate, se_rate) %>%
  rename(ctrl_rate = "mean_rate", 
         ctrl_se = "se_rate")

trts <- summary %>%
  filter(del==1) %>%
  mutate(pairing = str_sub(trt, 1, 2), 
         pairing = ifelse(pairing == "DR", "DR", "CO")) %>%
  select(pairing, trt, Study_shorthand, year, Burial, Nutrient, mean_rate, se_rate) %>%
  rename(del_rate = "mean_rate", 
         del_se = "se_rate")

paired <- left_join(con, trts) %>%
  mutate(diff = del_rate-ctrl_rate, 
         start = as.Date(substr(Burial,1,7), format = "%m/%d/%y"),
         end = as.Date(str_sub(Burial, -7, -1), format = "%m/%d/%y"), 
         month = month(start), start=if_else(is.na(start), 
                          as.Date(paste0(year, "-07-01")), 
                          start)) %>%
  filter(Nutrient == "NO3.N")

ggplot(paired, aes(start, diff, color = as.factor(month)))+
  geom_point() +
  ylab("Deluge - Control")+
  facet_wrap(~Study_shorthand, scales = "free")+
  theme_bw()
```
